title: Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Gadhada
tagline: Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Gadhada — spiritual town of Gujarat

overview.short: Swaminarayan Mandir, Gadhada (Devnagari: श्री स्वामिनारायण मन्दिर, गढडा), also known as Gopinathji Dev mandir, is a Hindu temple in Gadhada, Gujarat, India.
overview.description: Swaminarayan Mandir, Gadhada (Devnagari: श्री स्वामिनारायण मन्दिर, गढडा), also known as Gopinathji Dev mandir, is a Hindu temple in Gadhada, Gujarat, India. This Swaminarayan Sampradaya temple is one of the six temples built by the sect's founder Swaminarayan. The temple is dedicated to Radha Krishna.

topPlaces.name: Gadhada
topPlaces.description: Gadhada is a town and a municipality in Botad District in the state of Gujarat, India. Gadhada is situated at bank of River Ghela.

topPlaces.name: Ghela
topPlaces.description: The River Ghela is a river that runs through the town of Gadhada in the Indian state of Gujarat. The Ghela river originates from the Jasdan hills, near Fulzar village in the Jasdan district and flows into the Arabian sea.

topPlaces.name: Vanali
topPlaces.description: Vanali is a medium size village located in Gadhda division of Botad district, Saurashtra, India with 279 families residing.

topPlaces.name: Ugamedi
topPlaces.description: Ugamedi is a panchayat located in the Gadhada taluka of Botad district in Gujarat State, India. The latitude 22.0009555 and longitude 71.6480527 are the geo-coordinate of the Ugamedi.

items.note: Gadhada is a town and a municipality in Botad District in the state of Gujarat, India. Gadhada is situated at bank of River Ghela.

The River Ghela is a river that runs through the town of Gadhada in the Indian state of Gujarat. The Ghela river originates from the Jasdan hills, near Fulzar village in the Jasdan district and flows into the Arabian sea.
Vanali is a medium size village located in Gadhda division of Botad district, Saurashtra, India with 279 families residing.
Ugamedi is a panchayat located in the Gadhada taluka of Botad district in Gujarat State, India. The latitude 22.0009555 and longitude 71.6480527 are the geo-coordinate of the Ugamedi.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Gadhada?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Gadhada is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Gadhada?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Bhavnagar Airport (67 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (89 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Gadhada?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Gadhada at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Gadhada?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Gadhada start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Swaminarayan Mandir, Gadhada?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gadhada, Ghela, Vanali, Ugamedi.
